answers.q4: Futuristic and technology-inspired, but clean and lightweight. Subtle motion on select artifacts (not overdone). Soft, light colors — not dark theme. The feel should be enlightening and bright, not moody. Think: clean white/light base with soft accent colors (light blues, soft teals, gentle gradients). Subtle floating or parallax motion on decorative elements. Professional and modern without being flashy or heavy.
